message:
fix: truncateChars uses rune count for UTF-8 aware truncation (GAP-5.01)

The old implementation used len(s) (byte count) which miscounts
multi-byte characters and can split them mid-rune, producing invalid
UTF-8. Now uses []rune conversion to count and slice by characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
